description: An ordered group of media — a gallery. `refs` lists media blob CIDs in display order; the mimetype of each is carried by its own media record, so a series may mix images, video, and other types. Extracted from a run of consecutive inline media embeds. The record's rkey is the content CID of those refs, so re-running extraction upserts the same record. Bodies reference a series as ![](series://<rkey>).

title.description: Gallery title — the heading immediately above the run, if any. Optional.

refs.description: Media blob CIDs, in display order. Any mimetype.
